Interface ActiveAbility

All Superinterfaces:
Ability
All Known Implementing Classes:
DoubleHaul, FishersFrenzy, PatientAngler
public interface ActiveAbility extends Ability
Extension of Ability for abilities that are manually triggered by the player.

Active abilities participate in the ActiveAbilityCoordinator framework: when the player sneaks and right-clicks while holding the skill's trigger material, the coordinator opens a selection GUI populated from all unlocked ActiveAbility instances for that skill. Clicking an ability calls onActivate(Player, UUID).

The default activation() text matches the coordinator's gesture so individual abilities do not need to repeat it. Override only if an ability has a genuinely different or additional activation mechanic.

The default selectionStatus(UUID) returns "<green>Ready". Override to reflect cooldown, pending, or buff state.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    activation()
    Player-facing instructions for how to trigger this ability.
    void
    onActivate(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
    Called by the framework when the player selects this ability from the GUI.
    default String
    selectionStatus(UUID uuid)
    Short MiniMessage string reflecting this ability's current state, shown as the item lore in the selection GUI.
    default StatusLevel
    statusLevel(UUID uuid)
    Returns the current state of this ability for GUI display purposes.

    Methods inherited from interface Ability

    description, id, name, unlockLevel

  • Method Details

    • activation

      default String activation()
      Player-facing instructions for how to trigger this ability. Defaults to the standard coordinator gesture text.
      Returns:
      a short activation description shown in the skill detail GUI

    • onActivate

      void onActivate(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
      Called by the framework when the player selects this ability from the GUI. Implementations are responsible for checking cooldown / pending state and sending appropriate feedback to the player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player who triggered the ability
      uuid - the player's UUID

    • selectionStatus

      default String selectionStatus(UUID uuid)
      Short MiniMessage string reflecting this ability's current state, shown as the item lore in the selection GUI. Examples: "<green>Ready", "<red>12s", "<yellow>Pending".
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a MiniMessage status string

    • statusLevel

      default StatusLevel statusLevel(UUID uuid)
      Returns the current state of this ability for GUI display purposes. The ActiveAbilityCoordinator uses this to select an appropriate display material without parsing the selectionStatus(UUID) string.

      Defaults to StatusLevel.READY. Override whenever the ability has pending, cooldown, or active-buff states.

      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      the current status level
